name: Define your niche
questions: What is the specific demographic you want to sell the product to? Why would they buy your product? What need do they have that your product fulfills?
example: BabyToon targets parents who are tired of being worried about their kids when it’s time to feed because they might hurt themselves with the spoon or throw it on the floor.

name: Evolve your product in accordance with your values
questions: What universal values and beliefs do you hold close that define your work culture?
example: BabyToon works to build a culture where good ideas are valued and others can be inspired. It clearly isn’t showing its value as one of profit making but more as solving problems.

name: Be authentic
questions: What about you reflects in your product and your company, and all the promotions you do for it?
example: BabyToon’s CEO is very honest about how the idea originated at a science fair and how money or fame is not why she is excited about the product. She is just being herself on the show so the judges like her authenticity.
